description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain texture and a matte finish. The handle is thick and ergonomically shaped, tapering slightly toward the end for a secure grip. The axe head is made of dark, forged metal with a broad, wedge-shaped blade and a flat poll opposite the cutting edge. The blade has a single sharp edge and a pronounced beard, allowing for controlled chopping and splitting. The head is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting, with the wood visible through the top of the axe head. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the blade.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a dark, wedge-shaped metal blade, designed for chopping and splitting tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, dark metal blade with a sharp edge.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded end of the handle and the narrow profile of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the blade's thickness, the wedged mounting, and the handle's cross-section.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural grain, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, and a slightly flared end.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a pronounced beard and flat poll, no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting with the handle passing through the axe head and secured at the top.
